On protected prairie rehab, but it overhangs the trail. Kind of scraggly, but there is lots of fruit. Access: Public.

[18120 SW Lower Boones Ferry Road] On "landscaped" area between Club Sport's business park and the business park to the west. Tree is directly across from the sports medicine office. No one bothered us as we picked... in fact people from offices joined us!
